data.title: US Stocks Likely To Open Higher After Nasdaq 100 Enters Correction Zone: 'Economic Resilience Provides A Foundation For Market Stabilization,' Says Expert
data.description: U.S. stock futures rose on Friday following Thursday's selloff that pushed the Nasdaq 100 index into the correction zone.

data.title: Phoenix Motor Forecasts Tenfold Revenue Growth In 2024, Stock Jumps
data.description: Phoenix Motor shares jump premarket after disclosing 2024 and 2025 revenue guidance. Projects significant growth and profitability.

data.title: COPT Defense Properties Faces Risks: Analyst Sees Uncertainty In Leasing Process Amid Budget Cut Risks
data.description: JP Morgan analyst lowers COPT Defense Properties' price target to $29, citing risks from budget cuts, Space Command HQ uncertainty, and slow data center growth.

data.title: SpaceX CEO Elon Musk Says Starship For Next Test Flight Would Be Ready In '4 To 6 Weeks'
data.description: SpaceX CEO Elon Musk said on Friday that the next Starship vehicle for the upcoming test flight will be ready in 4 to 6 weeks.

data.title: Broadcom Stock Surges Nearly 13% In Friday Pre-Market: What's Going On?
data.description: Shares of Broadcom Inc. (NASDAQ: AVGO) climbed 12.6% during the pre-market trading session on Friday following the company's first quarter earnings and revenue beat.
